title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nike India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
